title: マイルCS南部杯の後に・ここが天国

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! Tohoku dirt! Tohoku air! Lend me your
poooweeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if her prayers were answered, Agnes Digital
claims today's crown with a turbulent display of
skill.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
You did it, Digital! And your winn'n concert was
the cat's pajamas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wuhuhuh! What a beautiful compliment!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It was all because of your support that I could
assume my power-level-530,000 final form! It
was like running in heaven!

text_block_list.name: Local Umamusume Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, those centr'l runners really let it rip! I've
never seen anyone run so fast!

text_block_list.name: Local Umamusume Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
That was Agnes Digital, wasn't it? She's got
herself a new fan!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whuh?!

text_block_list.name: Local Umamusume Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
There she is! Umm... Digital? Would y'mind if I get
a handshake?

text_block_list.name: Local Umamusume Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
You were so amaz'n! I wanna shake your hand too!
Oh, 'n after that, can I get your autograph?!

text_block_list.name: Local Umamusume Spectator E
text_block_list.text: You were far out in today's race! You were like whooosh 'cross the track. I wanna run like you someday!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're super popular, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! P-popular? ...Popular??? Me????!?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
T-T-Trainer, what do I do with all this pure and
innocent adoration?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I don't deserve to be the apple of such pure eyes! I'm supposed to be adoring them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what do I do? My brain might short-circuit at
any moment—
choice_data_list: A good fan doesn't let her oshis down, right?
A good fan doesn't let her oshis down, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hrngh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Nothing is more important than my
oshis! If it's what they want, I'll shake their hands
like my life depends on it and pour my entire soul
into signing those autographs!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What are my hesitation and embarrassment but
trifles in comparison?!

text_block_list.name: Local Umamusume Spectator C
text_block_list.text: Thanks a million for the handshake, Digital!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: No, thank you! I won't be washing this hand for a while!

text_block_list.name: Local Umamusume Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You're a hoot, y'know that? You'd better
wash your hands! At least, b'fore you eat.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Wheeze... ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. Heaven... is in Morioka...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you seem to be hav'ng fun, Digital. Come
back to Morioka soon, y'hear! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, you know I will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital's regional trip ends up a
great success.
